title: Dinner with the Server
description: Order a full dinner - drinks, appetizer, main, and split the bill at the end.

t1.text: Good evening, welcome in. Can I start you off with something to drink?

templates.text: Yes, could we have a bottle of sparkling water and a glass of red wine?
templates.hint_zh: 好的,可以給我們一瓶氣泡水跟一杯紅酒嗎?

t3.text: Sure, any preference for the red? We have a lovely Malbec by the glass tonight.

templates.text: The Malbec sounds great. I'll go with that.
templates.hint_zh: Malbec 聽起來不錯,我點那個。

t5.text: Great choice. Have you had a chance to look at the menu, or should I give you a few more minutes?

templates.text: We're ready, actually. Could we share the burrata to start?
templates.hint_zh: 我們其實已經想好了,前菜想分一份布拉塔起司。

t7.text: Excellent, the burrata is one of our favorites. And for mains?

templates.text: I'll have the salmon, and could you tell me what's in the risotto today?
templates.hint_zh: 我要鮭魚,可以說一下今天的燉飯有什麼食材嗎?

t9.text: Tonight's risotto is wild mushroom with truffle oil and parmesan, finished with chives.

templates.text: That sounds delicious. We'll take that for the second main.
templates.hint_zh: 聽起來很棒,我們第二個主菜要那個。

t11.text: Wonderful. Any allergies I should let the kitchen know about?

templates.text: No allergies, but my friend doesn't eat shellfish if you can pass that on.
templates.hint_zh: 沒有過敏,但麻煩告知我朋友不吃帶殼海鮮。

t13.text: I'll let them know. I'll be back with your drinks shortly.

templates.text: Great, thank you. Could we also get the bill split when we're done?
templates.hint_zh: 好的,謝謝。等等吃完可以幫我們分開結帳嗎?

t15.text: Of course, just let me know how you want it divided when you're ready.

templates.text: Perfect. Thanks so much for your help.
